name: P2026AIMEII_6
proof:
import Mathlib
import Aesop
open BigOperators Classical ENNReal Equiv EuclideanGeometry Filter Finset Fintype Function Lex List MeasureTheory Nat ProbabilityTheory Real SimpleGraph Real Nat Topology Rat
set_option maxHeartbeats 0
theorem P2026AIMEII_6 : ∃ (P2026AIMEII_6_answer : Nat), ({r : ℝ | (0 : ℝ) < r ∧ ∃ (x : ℝ) (y : ℝ), (2 : ℝ) * y = x ^ (2 : ℕ) - (8 : ℝ) * x + (12 : ℝ) ∧ (x - (4 : ℝ)) ^ (2 : ℕ) + (y - (39 : ℝ)) ^ (2 : ℕ) = r ^ (2 : ℕ) ∧ x - (4 : ℝ) + (y - (39 : ℝ)) * (x - (4 : ℝ)) = (0 : ℝ)} = {(9 : ℝ), (41 : ℝ)} ∧ ∑ r ∈ {(9 : ℝ), (41 : ℝ)}, r = (↑P2026AIMEII_6_answer : ℝ)) := by 
  have h_main : ({r : ℝ | (0 : ℝ) < r ∧ ∃ (x : ℝ) (y : ℝ), (2 : ℝ) * y = x ^ (2 : ℕ) - (8 : ℝ) * x + (12 : ℝ) ∧ (x - (4 : ℝ)) ^ (2 : ℕ) + (y - (39 : ℝ)) ^ (2 : ℕ) = r ^ (2 : ℕ) ∧ x - (4 : ℝ) + (y - (39 : ℝ)) * (x - (4 : ℝ)) = (0 : ℝ)} = {(9 : ℝ), (41 : ℝ)}) := by
    apply Set.ext
    intro r
    simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Set.mem_insert_iff, Set.mem_singleton_iff]
    constructor
    · 
      intro h
      have h₁ : 0 < r := h.1
      have h₂ : ∃ (x : ℝ) (y : ℝ), (2 : ℝ) * y = x ^ (2 : ℕ) - (8 : ℝ) * x + (12 : ℝ) ∧ (x - (4 : ℝ)) ^ (2 : ℕ) + (y - (39 : ℝ)) ^ (2 : ℕ) = r ^ (2 : ℕ) ∧ x - (4 : ℝ) + (y - (39 : ℝ)) * (x - (4 : ℝ)) = (0 : ℝ) := h.2
      rcases h₂ with ⟨x, y, h₂₁, h₂₂, h₂₃⟩
      have h₃ : (x - 4 : ℝ) * (y - 38 : ℝ) = 0 := by
        have h₃₁ : x - (4 : ℝ) + (y - (39 : ℝ)) * (x - (4 : ℝ)) = (0 : ℝ) := h₂₃
        ring_nf at h₃₁ ⊢
        linarith
      have h₄ : x = 4 ∨ y = 38 := by
        have h₄₁ : (x - 4 : ℝ) = 0 ∨ (y - 38 : ℝ) = 0 := by
          apply eq_zero_or_eq_zero_of_mul_eq_zero h₃
        cases h₄₁ with
        | inl h₄₁ =>
          exact Or.inl (by linarith)
        | inr h₄₁ =>
          exact Or.inr (by linarith)
      cases h₄ with
      | inl h₄ =>
        
        have h₅ : x = 4 := h₄
        have h₆ : y = -2 := by
          have h₆₁ : (2 : ℝ) * y = x ^ (2 : ℕ) - (8 : ℝ) * x + (12 : ℝ) := h₂₁
          rw [h₅] at h₆₁
          norm_num at h₆₁ ⊢
          linarith
        have h₇ : r = 41 := by
          have h₇₁ : (x - (4 : ℝ)) ^ (2 : ℕ) + (y - (39 : ℝ)) ^ (2 : ℕ) = r ^ (2 : ℕ) := h₂₂
          rw [h₅, h₆] at h₇₁
          norm_num at h₇₁ ⊢
          have h₇₂ : r > 0 := h₁
          have h₇₃ : r ^ 2 = 1681 := by linarith
          have h₇₄ : r = 41 := by
            nlinarith
          exact h₇₄
        rw [h₇]
        norm_num
      | inr h₄ =>
        
        have h₅ : y = 38 := h₄
        have h₆ : x = 4 + Real.sqrt 80 ∨ x = 4 - Real.sqrt 80 := by
          have h₆₁ : (2 : ℝ) * y = x ^ (2 : ℕ) - (8 : ℝ) * x + (12 : ℝ) := h₂₁
          rw [h₅] at h₆₁
          have h₆₂ : x ^ 2 - 8 * x - 64 = 0 := by
            ring_nf at h₆₁ ⊢
            linarith
          have h₆₃ : x = 4 + Real.sqrt 80 ∨ x = 4 - Real.sqrt 80 := by
            have h₆₄ : x = 4 + Real.sqrt 80 ∨ x = 4 - Real.sqrt 80 := by
              apply or_iff_not_imp_left.mpr
              intro h₆₅
              apply mul_left_cancel₀ (sub_ne_zero.mpr h₆₅)
              nlinarith [Real.sq_sqrt (show 0 ≤ 80 by norm_num), Real.sqrt_nonneg 80, sq_nonneg (x - 4)]
            exact h₆₄
          exact h₆₃
        cases h₆ with
        | inl h₆ =>
          have h₇ : x = 4 + Real.sqrt 80 := h₆
          have h₈ : r = 9 := by
            have h₈₁ : (x - (4 : ℝ)) ^ (2 : ℕ) + (y - (39 : ℝ)) ^ (2 : ℕ) = r ^ (2 : ℕ) := h₂₂
            rw [h₇, h₅] at h₈₁
            norm_num at h₈₁ ⊢
            have h₈₂ : r > 0 := h₁
            have h₈₃ : r ^ 2 = 81 := by
              nlinarith [Real.sq_sqrt (show 0 ≤ 80 by norm_num), Real.sqrt_nonneg 80]
            have h₈₄ : r = 9 := by
              nlinarith
            exact h₈₄
          rw [h₈]
          norm_num
        | inr h₆ =>
          have h₇ : x = 4 - Real.sqrt 80 := h₆
          have h₈ : r = 9 := by
            have h₈₁ : (x - (4 : ℝ)) ^ (2 : ℕ) + (y - (39 : ℝ)) ^ (2 : ℕ) = r ^ (2 : ℕ) := h₂₂
            rw [h₇, h₅] at h₈₁
            norm_num at h₈₁ ⊢
            have h₈₂ : r > 0 := h₁
            have h₈₃ : r ^ 2 = 81 := by
              nlinarith [Real.sq_sqrt (show 0 ≤ 80 by norm_num), Real.sqrt_nonneg 80]
            have h₈₄ : r = 9 := by
              nlinarith
            exact h₈₄
          rw [h₈]
          norm_num
    · 
      intro h
      have h₁ : r = 9 ∨ r = 41 := h
      have h₂ : 0 < r ∧ ∃ (x : ℝ) (y : ℝ), (2 : ℝ) * y = x ^ (2 : ℕ) - (8 : ℝ) * x + (12 : ℝ) ∧ (x - (4 : ℝ)) ^ (2 : ℕ) + (y - (39 : ℝ)) ^ (2 : ℕ) = r ^ (2 : ℕ) ∧ x - (4 : ℝ) + (y - (39 : ℝ)) * (x - (4 : ℝ)) = (0 : ℝ) := by
        cases h₁ with
        | inl h₁ =>
          have h₃ : r = 9 := h₁
          have h₄ : 0 < r := by rw [h₃]; norm_num
          have h₅ : ∃ (x : ℝ) (y : ℝ), (2 : ℝ) * y = x ^ (2 : ℕ) - (8 : ℝ) * x + (12 : ℝ) ∧ (x - (4 : ℝ)) ^ (2 : ℕ) + (y - (39 : ℝ)) ^ (2 : ℕ) = r ^ (2 : ℕ) ∧ x - (4 : ℝ) + (y - (39 : ℝ)) * (x - (4 : ℝ)) = (0 : ℝ) := by
            use (4 + Real.sqrt 80), (38 : ℝ)
            constructor
            · 
              have h₅₁ : (2 : ℝ) * (38 : ℝ) = (4 + Real.sqrt 80 : ℝ) ^ (2 : ℕ) - (8 : ℝ) * (4 + Real.sqrt 80 : ℝ) + (12 : ℝ) := by
                norm_num
                <;>
                nlinarith [Real.sq_sqrt (show 0 ≤ 80 by norm_num), Real.sqrt_nonneg 80]
              exact h₅₁
            · constructor
              · 
                have h₅₂ : ((4 + Real.sqrt 80 : ℝ) - (4 : ℝ)) ^ (2 : ℕ) + ((38 : ℝ) - (39 : ℝ)) ^ (2 : ℕ) = (9 : ℝ) ^ (2 : ℕ) := by
                  norm_num
                  <;>
                  nlinarith [Real.sq_sqrt (show 0 ≤ 80 by norm_num), Real.sqrt_nonneg 80]
                rw [h₃] at *
                exact h₅₂
              · 
                have h₅₃ : (4 + Real.sqrt 80 : ℝ) - (4 : ℝ) + ((38 : ℝ) - (39 : ℝ)) * ((4 + Real.sqrt 80 : ℝ) - (4 : ℝ)) = (0 : ℝ) := by
                  norm_num
                  <;>
                  nlinarith [Real.sq_sqrt (show 0 ≤ 80 by norm_num), Real.sqrt_nonneg 80]
                exact h₅₃
          exact ⟨h₄, h₅⟩
        | inr h₁ =>
          have h₃ : r = 41 := h₁
          have h₄ : 0 < r := by rw [h₃]; norm_num
          have h₅ : ∃ (x : ℝ) (y : ℝ), (2 : ℝ) * y = x ^ (2 : ℕ) - (8 : ℝ) * x + (12 : ℝ) ∧ (x - (4 : ℝ)) ^ (2 : ℕ) + (y - (39 : ℝ)) ^ (2 : ℕ) = r ^ (2 : ℕ) ∧ x - (4 : ℝ) + (y - (39 : ℝ)) * (x - (4 : ℝ)) = (0 : ℝ) := by
            use (4 : ℝ), (-2 : ℝ)
            constructor
            · 
              have h₅₁ : (2 : ℝ) * (-2 : ℝ) = (4 : ℝ) ^ (2 : ℕ) - (8 : ℝ) * (4 : ℝ) + (12 : ℝ) := by
                norm_num
              exact h₅₁
            · constructor
              · 
                have h₅₂ : ((4 : ℝ) - (4 : ℝ)) ^ (2 : ℕ) + ((-2 : ℝ) - (39 : ℝ)) ^ (2 : ℕ) = (41 : ℝ) ^ (2 : ℕ) := by
                  norm_num
                rw [h₃] at *
                exact h₅₂
              · 
                have h₅₃ : (4 : ℝ) - (4 : ℝ) + ((-2 : ℝ) - (39 : ℝ)) * ((4 : ℝ) - (4 : ℝ)) = (0 : ℝ) := by
                  norm_num
                exact h₅₃
          exact ⟨h₄, h₅⟩
      exact h₂
  
  have h_sum : (∑ r ∈ {(9 : ℝ), (41 : ℝ)}, r : ℝ) = (50 : ℝ) := by
    norm_num [Finset.sum_pair (show (9 : ℝ) ≠ (41 : ℝ) by norm_num)]
    <;>
    simp_all [Set.ext_iff]
    <;>
    norm_num
    <;>
    aesop
  
  have h_final : ∃ (P2026AIMEII_6_answer : Nat), ({r : ℝ | (0 : ℝ) < r ∧ ∃ (x : ℝ) (y : ℝ), (2 : ℝ) * y = x ^ (2 : ℕ) - (8 : ℝ) * x + (12 : ℝ) ∧ (x - (4 : ℝ)) ^ (2 : ℕ) + (y - (39 : ℝ)) ^ (2 : ℕ) = r ^ (2 : ℕ) ∧ x - (4 : ℝ) + (y - (39 : ℝ)) * (x - (4 : ℝ)) = (0 : ℝ)} = {(9 : ℝ), (41 : ℝ)} ∧ ∑ r ∈ {(9 : ℝ), (41 : ℝ)}, r = (↑P2026AIMEII_6_answer : ℝ)) := by
    refine' ⟨50, _⟩
    constructor
    · 
      exact h_main
    · 
      norm_num [h_sum]
      <;> simp_all [Set.ext_iff]
      <;> norm_num
      <;> aesop
  
  exact h_final

name: P2026AIMEI_1
proof:
import Mathlib
import Aesop
open BigOperators Classical ENNReal Equiv EuclideanGeometry Filter Finset Fintype Function Lex List MeasureTheory Nat ProbabilityTheory Real SimpleGraph Real Nat Topology Rat
set_option maxHeartbeats 0
theorem P2026AIMEI_1 : ∃ (P2026AIMEI_1_answer : Nat), ∀ (d p : ℚ), (((0 : ℚ) < p) ∧ (d / p = d / (p + (2 : ℚ)) + (1 : ℚ)) ∧ (d / (p + (2 : ℚ)) = d / (p + (9 : ℚ)) + (1 : ℚ))) → (∃ (m : ℕ) (n : ℕ), m.Coprime n ∧ d = (↑m : ℚ) / (↑n : ℚ) ∧ m + n = P2026AIMEI_1_answer) := by 
  have h_main : ∃ (P2026AIMEI_1_answer : Nat), ∀ (d p : ℚ), (((0 : ℚ) < p) ∧ (d / p = d / (p + (2 : ℚ)) + (1 : ℚ)) ∧ (d / (p + (2 : ℚ)) = d / (p + (9 : ℚ)) + (1 : ℚ))) → (∃ (m : ℕ) (n : ℕ), m.Coprime n ∧ d = (↑m : ℚ) / (↑n : ℚ) ∧ m + n = P2026AIMEI_1_answer) := by
    use 277
    intro d p h
    have h₁ : 0 < p := h.1
    have h₂ : d / p = d / (p + 2) + 1 := h.2.1
    have h₃ : d / (p + 2) = d / (p + 9) + 1 := h.2.2
    have h₄ : d = 252 / 25 := by
      have h₄₁ : p ≠ 0 := by linarith
      have h₄₂ : p + 2 ≠ 0 := by linarith
      have h₄₃ : p + 9 ≠ 0 := by linarith
      field_simp at h₂ h₃
      ring_nf at h₂ h₃ ⊢
      nlinarith [sq_pos_of_ne_zero (sub_ne_zero.mpr h₄₁), sq_pos_of_ne_zero (sub_ne_zero.mpr h₄₂), sq_pos_of_ne_zero (sub_ne_zero.mpr h₄₃)]
    have h₅ : ∃ (m : ℕ) (n : ℕ), m.Coprime n ∧ d = (↑m : ℚ) / (↑n : ℚ) ∧ m + n = 277 := by
      use 252, 25
      constructor
      · 
        norm_num [Nat.coprime_iff_gcd_eq_one, Nat.gcd_eq_right]
      constructor
      · 
        rw [h₄]
        <;> norm_num
      · 
        norm_num
    exact h₅
  exact h_main

name: P2026AIMEI_12
proof:
import Mathlib
import Aesop
open BigOperators Classical ENNReal Equiv EuclideanGeometry Filter Finset Fintype Function Lex List MeasureTheory Nat ProbabilityTheory Real SimpleGraph Real Nat Topology Rat
set_option maxHeartbeats 0
theorem P2026AIMEI_12 : ∃ (P2026AIMEI_12_answer : ℕ), ∀ (m n : ℕ), (((0 : ℕ) < m) ∧ ((0 : ℕ) < n) ∧ (m.Coprime n) ∧ (let A := ((0 : ℝ), (0 : ℝ), (1 : ℝ)); let B := ((6 : ℝ), (0 : ℝ), (2 : ℝ)); let C := ((0 : ℝ), (4 : ℝ), (3 : ℝ)); let D := ((42 / 13 : ℝ), (124 / 39 : ℝ), (↑m : ℝ) / (↑n : ℝ)); (B.1 - A.1) * ((C.2.1 - A.2.1) * (D.2.2 - A.2.2) - (C.2.2 - A.2.2) * (D.2.1 - A.2.1)) - (B.2.1 - A.2.1) * ((C.1 - A.1) * (D.2.2 - A.2.2) - (C.2.2 - A.2.2) * (D.1 - A.1)) + (B.2.2 - A.2.2) * ((C.1 - A.1) * (D.2.1 - A.2.1) - (C.2.1 - A.2.1) * (D.1 - A.1)) = (0 : ℝ))) → (m + n = P2026AIMEI_12_answer) := by 
  have h_main : ∃ (P2026AIMEI_12_answer : ℕ), ∀ (m n : ℕ), (((0 : ℕ) < m) ∧ ((0 : ℕ) < n) ∧ (m.Coprime n) ∧ (let A := ((0 : ℝ), (0 : ℝ), (1 : ℝ)); let B := ((6 : ℝ), (0 : ℝ), (2 : ℝ)); let C := ((0 : ℝ), (4 : ℝ), (3 : ℝ)); let D := ((42 / 13 : ℝ), (124 / 39 : ℝ), (↑m : ℝ) / (↑n : ℝ)); (B.1 - A.1) * ((C.2.1 - A.2.1) * (D.2.2 - A.2.2) - (C.2.2 - A.2.2) * (D.2.1 - A.2.1)) - (B.2.1 - A.2.1) * ((C.1 - A.1) * (D.2.2 - A.2.2) - (C.2.2 - A.2.2) * (D.1 - A.1)) + (B.2.2 - A.2.2) * ((C.1 - A.1) * (D.2.1 - A.2.1) - (C.2.1 - A.2.1) * (D.1 - A.1)) = (0 : ℝ))) → (m + n = P2026AIMEI_12_answer) := by
    use 161
    intro m n h
    have h₁ : 0 < m := by tauto
    have h₂ : 0 < n := by tauto
    have h₃ : m.Coprime n := by tauto
    dsimp at h
    have h₄ : (m : ℝ) / n = 122 / 39 := by
      ring_nf at h ⊢
      field_simp [h₁.ne', h₂.ne', sub_eq_zero, add_eq_zero_iff_eq_neg] at h ⊢
      ring_nf at h ⊢
      norm_cast at h ⊢
      <;>
      (try norm_num at h ⊢) <;>
      (try ring_nf at h ⊢) <;>
      (try norm_num at h ⊢) <;>
      (try nlinarith) <;>
      (try
        {
          nlinarith [mul_pos h₁ h₂, mul_pos (by positivity : (0 : ℕ) < 122) h₂,
            mul_pos h₁ (by positivity : (0 : ℕ) < 39)]
        })
      <;>
      (try
        {
          nlinarith [mul_pos h₁ h₂, mul_pos (by positivity : (0 : ℕ) < 122) h₂,
            mul_pos h₁ (by positivity : (0 : ℕ) < 39)]
        })
    have h₅ : m = 122 := by
      have h₅₁ : (m : ℝ) / n = 122 / 39 := h₄
      have h₅₂ : (n : ℝ) ≠ 0 := by positivity
      have h₅₃ : (m : ℝ) = (122 : ℝ) / 39 * n := by
        field_simp at h₅₁ ⊢
        <;> ring_nf at h₅₁ ⊢ <;> nlinarith
      have h₅₄ : (m : ℝ) * 39 = (122 : ℝ) * n := by
        ring_nf at h₅₃ ⊢
        <;> linarith
      have h₅₅ : (m : ℕ) * 39 = (122 : ℕ) * n := by
        norm_cast at h₅₄ ⊢
        <;> ring_nf at h₅₄ ⊢ <;> norm_cast at h₅₄ ⊢ <;>
          (try omega) <;>
          (try nlinarith) <;>
          (try linarith)
      have h₅₆ : m = 122 := by
        have h₅₇ : m.Coprime n := h₃
        have h₅₈ : m = 122 := by
          have h₅₉ : m * 39 = 122 * n := by
            exact_mod_cast h₅₅
          have h₅₁₀ : m.Coprime n := h₅₇
          have h₅₁₁ : m ∣ 122 * n := by
            use 39
            linarith
          have h₅₁₂ : m ∣ 122 * n := h₅₁₁
          have h₅₁₃ : m.Coprime n := h₅₁₀
          have h₅₁₄ : m ∣ 122 := by
            have h₅₁₅ : m.Coprime n := h₅₁₃
            have h₅₁₆ : m ∣ 122 * n := h₅₁₂
            have h₅₁₇ : m ∣ 122 * n := h₅₁₆
            have h₅₁₈ : m ∣ 122 := by
              have h₅₁₉ : m.Coprime n := h₅₁₅
              have h₅₂₀ : m ∣ 122 * n := h₅₁₇
              have h₅₂₁ : m ∣ 122 := by
                
                have h₅₂₂ : m ∣ 122 * n := h₅₂₀
                have h₅₂₃ : m.Coprime n := h₅₁₉
                have h₅₂₄ : m ∣ 122 := by
                  
                  exact Nat.Coprime.dvd_of_dvd_mul_right h₅₂₃ h₅₂₂
                exact h₅₂₄
              exact h₅₂₁
            exact h₅₁₈
          have h₅₁₅ : m ∣ 122 := h₅₁₄
          have h₅₁₆ : m ≤ 122 := Nat.le_of_dvd (by norm_num) h₅₁₅
          interval_cases m <;> norm_num at h₅₉ h₅₁₀ h₅₅ ⊢ <;>
            (try omega) <;>
            (try norm_num at h₅₁₀ ⊢ <;> omega) <;>
            (try
              {
                have h₅₁₇ : n ≤ 161 := by
                  nlinarith
                interval_cases n <;> norm_num at h₅₉ h₅₁₀ h₅₅ ⊢ <;>
                  (try omega) <;>
                  (try norm_num at h₅₁₀ ⊢ <;> omega)
              })
        exact h₅₈
      exact h₅₆
    have h₆ : n = 39 := by
      have h₆₁ : (m : ℝ) / n = 122 / 39 := h₄
      have h₆₂ : (n : ℝ) ≠ 0 := by positivity
      have h₆₃ : (m : ℝ) = (122 : ℝ) / 39 * n := by
        field_simp at h₆₁ ⊢
        <;> ring_nf at h₆₁ ⊢ <;> nlinarith
      have h₆₄ : (m : ℝ) * 39 = (122 : ℝ) * n := by
        ring_nf at h₆₃ ⊢
        <;> linarith
      have h₆₅ : (m : ℕ) * 39 = (122 : ℕ) * n := by
        norm_cast at h₆₄ ⊢
        <;> ring_nf at h₆₄ ⊢ <;> norm_cast at h₆₄ ⊢ <;>
          (try omega) <;>
          (try nlinarith) <;>
          (try linarith)
      have h₆₆ : n = 39 := by
        have h₆₇ : m.Coprime n := h₃
        have h₆₈ : m = 122 := h₅
        rw [h₆₈] at h₆₅
        have h₆₉ : (122 : ℕ) * 39 = (122 : ℕ) * n := by
          norm_num at h₆₅ ⊢
          <;> linarith
        have h₇₀ : n = 39 := by
          omega
        exact h₇₀
      exact h₆₆
    have h₇ : m + n = 161 := by
      rw [h₅, h₆]
      <;> norm_num
    exact h₇
  exact h_main

name: P2026AIMEI_3
proof:
import Mathlib
import Aesop
open BigOperators Classical ENNReal Equiv EuclideanGeometry Filter Finset Fintype Function Lex List MeasureTheory Nat ProbabilityTheory Real SimpleGraph Real Nat Topology Rat
set_option maxHeartbeats 0
theorem P2026AIMEI_3 : ∃ (P2026AIMEI_3_answer : Nat), (IsLeast {s : ℕ | ∃ (p : ℕ) (q : ℕ), p.Coprime q ∧ ((158 : ℚ) ^ (2 : ℕ) - (42 : ℚ) ^ (2 : ℕ)) / (200 : ℚ) ^ (2 : ℕ) = (↑p : ℚ) / (↑q : ℚ) ∧ s = p + q} P2026AIMEI_3_answer) := by 
  have h_main : ∃ (P2026AIMEI_3_answer : Nat), IsLeast {s : ℕ | ∃ (p : ℕ) (q : ℕ), p.Coprime q ∧ ((158 : ℚ) ^ (2 : ℕ) - (42 : ℚ) ^ (2 : ℕ)) / (200 : ℚ) ^ (2 : ℕ) = (↑p : ℚ) / (↑q : ℚ) ∧ s = p + q} P2026AIMEI_3_answer := by
    use 79
    constructor
    · 
      have h₁ : ∃ (p : ℕ) (q : ℕ), p.Coprime q ∧ ((158 : ℚ) ^ (2 : ℕ) - (42 : ℚ) ^ (2 : ℕ)) / (200 : ℚ) ^ (2 : ℕ) = (↑p : ℚ) / (↑q : ℚ) ∧ (79 : ℕ) = p + q := by
        
        use 29, 50
        constructor
        · 
          norm_num [Nat.coprime_iff_gcd_eq_one, Nat.gcd_eq_right]
        constructor
        · 
          norm_num [div_eq_mul_inv]
          <;>
          field_simp <;>
          ring_nf <;>
          norm_num <;>
          rfl
        · 
          norm_num
          <;>
          rfl
      exact h₁
    · 
      intro s hs
      rcases hs with ⟨p, q, hpq, hfrac, hsum⟩
      have h₁ : s ≥ 79 := by
        have h₂ : s = p + q := by linarith
        rw [h₂]
        have h₃ : p + q ≥ 79 := by
          by_contra h
          have h₄ : p + q ≤ 78 := by linarith
          have h₅ : p ≤ 78 := by omega
          have h₆ : q ≤ 78 := by omega
          interval_cases p <;> interval_cases q <;> norm_num [Nat.Coprime, Nat.gcd_eq_right] at hpq <;>
            (try omega) <;>
            (try {
              norm_num [div_eq_mul_inv] at hfrac <;>
              field_simp at hfrac <;>
              ring_nf at hfrac <;>
              norm_cast at hfrac <;>
              norm_num at hfrac <;>
              nlinarith
            }) <;>
            (try {
              norm_num [div_eq_mul_inv] at hfrac <;>
              field_simp at hfrac <;>
              ring_nf at hfrac <;>
              norm_cast at hfrac <;>
              norm_num at hfrac <;>
              nlinarith
            }) <;>
            (try omega)
        linarith
      exact h₁
  exact h_main

name: P2026AIMEI_5
proof:
import Mathlib
import Aesop
open BigOperators Classical ENNReal Equiv EuclideanGeometry Filter Finset Fintype Function Lex List MeasureTheory Nat ProbabilityTheory Real SimpleGraph Real Nat Topology Rat
set_option maxHeartbeats 0
theorem P2026AIMEI_5 : ∃ (P2026AIMEI_5_answer : Nat), ∀ (θ : ℝ), (((0 : ℝ) < θ ∧ θ < π / (2 : ℝ)) ∧ (√(((2 : ℝ) - cos θ) ^ (2 : ℕ) + sin θ ^ (2 : ℕ)) = (4 / 3 : ℝ))) → (Coprime (29 : ℕ) (36 : ℕ) ∧ cos θ = (29 / 36 : ℝ) ∧ (29 : ℕ) + (36 : ℕ) = P2026AIMEI_5_answer) := by 
  have h_main : ∃ (P2026AIMEI_5_answer : Nat), ∀ (θ : ℝ), (((0 : ℝ) < θ ∧ θ < π / (2 : ℝ)) ∧ (√(((2 : ℝ) - cos θ) ^ (2 : ℕ) + sin θ ^ (2 : ℕ)) = (4 / 3 : ℝ))) → (Coprime (29 : ℕ) (36 : ℕ) ∧ cos θ = (29 / 36 : ℝ) ∧ (29 : ℕ) + (36 : ℕ) = P2026AIMEI_5_answer) := by
    use 65
    intro θ h
    have h₁ : Coprime (29 : ℕ) (36 : ℕ) := by
      norm_num [Nat.coprime_iff_gcd_eq_one, Nat.gcd_eq_right]
    have h₂ : cos θ = (29 / 36 : ℝ) := by
      have h₃ : √(((2 : ℝ) - cos θ) ^ (2 : ℕ) + sin θ ^ (2 : ℕ)) = (4 / 3 : ℝ) := h.2
      have h₄ : 0 < θ := h.1.1
      have h₅ : θ < π / (2 : ℝ) := h.1.2
      have h₆ : 0 < Real.pi := by linarith [Real.pi_pos]
      have h₇ : 0 < Real.pi / 2 := by linarith
      have h₈ : 0 < θ ∧ θ < Real.pi / 2 := ⟨h₄, h₅⟩
      have h₉ : 0 < sin θ := Real.sin_pos_of_pos_of_lt_pi h₄ (by linarith [Real.pi_gt_three])
      have h₁₀ : 0 < cos θ := Real.cos_pos_of_mem_Ioo ⟨by linarith, by linarith [Real.pi_gt_three]⟩
      have h₁₁ : ((2 : ℝ) - cos θ) ^ 2 + sin θ ^ 2 = (16 / 9 : ℝ) := by
        have h₁₂ : √(((2 : ℝ) - cos θ) ^ (2 : ℕ) + sin θ ^ (2 : ℕ)) = (4 / 3 : ℝ) := h₃
        have h₁₃ : 0 ≤ ((2 : ℝ) - cos θ) ^ 2 + sin θ ^ 2 := by positivity
        have h₁₄ : √(((2 : ℝ) - cos θ) ^ 2 + sin θ ^ 2) = (4 / 3 : ℝ) := by simpa using h₁₂
        have h₁₅ : ((2 : ℝ) - cos θ) ^ 2 + sin θ ^ 2 = (16 / 9 : ℝ) := by
          nlinarith [Real.sq_sqrt (show 0 ≤ ((2 : ℝ) - cos θ) ^ 2 + sin θ ^ 2 by positivity),
            Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq θ]
        exact h₁₅
      have h₁₆ : cos θ = (29 / 36 : ℝ) := by
        have h₁₇ : ((2 : ℝ) - cos θ) ^ 2 + sin θ ^ 2 = (16 / 9 : ℝ) := h₁₁
        have h₁₈ : sin θ ^ 2 + cos θ ^ 2 = 1 := Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq θ
        nlinarith [Real.sin_le_one θ, Real.cos_le_one θ, Real.sin_sq_add_cos_sq θ]
      exact h₁₆
    have h₃ : (29 : ℕ) + (36 : ℕ) = 65 := by norm_num
    exact ⟨h₁, h₂, by simpa using h₃⟩
  exact h_main

name: P2026HMMT_1
proof:
import Mathlib
import Aesop
open BigOperators Classical ENNReal Equiv EuclideanGeometry Filter Finset Fintype Function Lex List MeasureTheory Nat ProbabilityTheory Real SimpleGraph Real Nat Topology Rat
set_option maxHeartbeats 0
theorem P2026HMMT_1 : ∃ (P2026HMMT_1_answer : ℝ), ∀ (m b x₃ : ℝ), ((x₃ ≠ (0 : ℝ)) ∧ (x₃ ≠ (6 : ℝ) ∧ x₃ ≠ (7 : ℝ)) ∧ (∀ (x : ℝ), x ≠ (0 : ℝ) → (x ^ (2 : ℕ) + (2 : ℝ) / x = m * x + b ↔ x = (6 : ℝ) ∨ x = (7 : ℝ) ∨ x = x₃))) → (x₃ = P2026HMMT_1_answer) := by 
  have h_main : ∃ (P2026HMMT_1_answer : ℝ), ∀ (m b x₃ : ℝ), ((x₃ ≠ (0 : ℝ)) ∧ (x₃ ≠ (6 : ℝ) ∧ x₃ ≠ (7 : ℝ)) ∧ (∀ (x : ℝ), x ≠ (0 : ℝ) → (x ^ (2 : ℕ) + (2 : ℝ) / x = m * x + b ↔ x = (6 : ℝ) ∨ x = (7 : ℝ) ∨ x = x₃))) → (x₃ = P2026HMMT_1_answer) := by
    use -1 / 21
    intro m b x₃ h
    have h₁ : x₃ ≠ 0 := h.1
    have h₂ : x₃ ≠ 6 := h.2.1.1
    have h₃ : x₃ ≠ 7 := h.2.1.2
    have h₄ : ∀ (x : ℝ), x ≠ (0 : ℝ) → (x ^ (2 : ℕ) + (2 : ℝ) / x = m * x + b ↔ x = (6 : ℝ) ∨ x = (7 : ℝ) ∨ x = x₃) := h.2.2
    have h₅ : x₃ = -1 / 21 := by
      have h₅₁ : x₃ ^ 2 + (2 : ℝ) / x₃ = m * x₃ + b := by
        have h₅₂ := h₄ x₃ h₁
        have h₅₃ : x₃ = (6 : ℝ) ∨ x₃ = (7 : ℝ) ∨ x₃ = x₃ := by tauto
        have h₅₄ : x₃ ^ (2 : ℕ) + (2 : ℝ) / x₃ = m * x₃ + b := by
          aesop
        exact h₅₄
      have h₅₅ : (6 : ℝ) ^ 2 + (2 : ℝ) / 6 = m * 6 + b := by
        have h₅₆ := h₄ 6 (by norm_num)
        have h₅₇ : (6 : ℝ) = (6 : ℝ) ∨ (6 : ℝ) = (7 : ℝ) ∨ (6 : ℝ) = x₃ := by tauto
        have h₅₈ : (6 : ℝ) ^ (2 : ℕ) + (2 : ℝ) / 6 = m * 6 + b := by
          aesop
        exact h₅₈
      have h₅₉ : (7 : ℝ) ^ 2 + (2 : ℝ) / 7 = m * 7 + b := by
        have h₅₁₀ := h₄ 7 (by norm_num)
        have h₅₁₁ : (7 : ℝ) = (6 : ℝ) ∨ (7 : ℝ) = (7 : ℝ) ∨ (7 : ℝ) = x₃ := by tauto
        have h₅₁₂ : (7 : ℝ) ^ (2 : ℕ) + (2 : ℝ) / 7 = m * 7 + b := by
          aesop
        exact h₅₁₂
      have h₅₁₃ : m = 272 / 21 := by
        ring_nf at h₅₅ h₅₉ ⊢
        linarith
      have h₅₁₄ : b = -869 / 21 := by
        ring_nf at h₅₅ h₅₉ ⊢
        linarith
      have h₅₁₅ : x₃ = -1 / 21 := by
        have h₅₁₆ := h₄ x₃ h₁
        have h₅₁₇ : x₃ = (6 : ℝ) ∨ x₃ = (7 : ℝ) ∨ x₃ = x₃ := by tauto
        have h₅₁₈ : x₃ ^ 2 + (2 : ℝ) / x₃ = m * x₃ + b := by aesop
        rw [h₅₁₃, h₅₁₄] at h₅₁₈
        have h₅₁₉ : x₃ ≠ 0 := h₁
        field_simp at h₅₁₈
        apply mul_left_cancel₀ (sub_ne_zero.mpr h₅₁₉)
        ring_nf at h₅₁₈ ⊢
        apply mul_left_cancel₀ (sub_ne_zero.mpr h₂)
        apply mul_left_cancel₀ (sub_ne_zero.mpr h₃)
        nlinarith [sq_pos_of_ne_zero (sub_ne_zero.mpr h₁), sq_pos_of_ne_zero (sub_ne_zero.mpr h₂), sq_pos_of_ne_zero (sub_ne_zero.mpr h₃)]
      exact h₅₁₅
    rw [h₅]
    <;> norm_num
  exact h_main

name: P2026HMMT_21
proof:
import Mathlib
import Aesop
open BigOperators Classical ENNReal Equiv EuclideanGeometry Filter Finset Fintype Function Lex List MeasureTheory Nat ProbabilityTheory Real SimpleGraph Real Nat Topology Rat
set_option maxHeartbeats 0
theorem P2026HMMT_21 : ∃ (P2026HMMT_21_answer : ℝ), ∀ (A B C D W X Y Z : ℝ × ℝ), ((A = ((0 : ℝ), (0 : ℝ)) ∧ B = ((12 : ℝ), (0 : ℝ)) ∧ C = ((12 : ℝ), (12 : ℝ)) ∧ D = ((0 : ℝ), (12 : ℝ))) ∧ (W = ((0 : ℝ), (4 : ℝ))) ∧ (X = ((5 : ℝ), (0 : ℝ))) ∧ (Y = (X.1 - (X.2 - W.2), X.2 + (X.1 - W.1)) ∧ Z = (W.1 - (X.2 - W.2), W.2 + (X.1 - W.1)) ∨ Y = (X.1 + (X.2 - W.2), X.2 - (X.1 - W.1)) ∧ Z = (W.1 + (X.2 - W.2), W.2 - (X.1 - W.1))) ∧ ((0 : ℝ) < Y.1 ∧ Y.1 < (12 : ℝ) ∧ (0 : ℝ) < Y.2 ∧ Y.2 < (12 : ℝ)) ∧ ((0 : ℝ) < Z.1 ∧ Z.1 < (12 : ℝ) ∧ (0 : ℝ) < Z.2 ∧ Z.2 < (12 : ℝ))) → (let triangleArea := |B.1 * (C.2 - Y.2) + C.1 * (Y.2 - B.2) + Y.1 * (B.2 - C.2)| / (2 : ℝ); triangleArea = P2026HMMT_21_answer) := by 
  use 18
  intro A B C D W X Y Z h
  have h₁ : A = ((0 : ℝ), (0 : ℝ)) := h.1.1
  have h₂ : B = ((12 : ℝ), (0 : ℝ)) := h.1.2.1
  have h₃ : C = ((12 : ℝ), (12 : ℝ)) := h.1.2.2.1
  have h₄ : D = ((0 : ℝ), (12 : ℝ)) := h.1.2.2.2
  have h₅ : W = ((0 : ℝ), (4 : ℝ)) := h.2.1
  have h₆ : X = ((5 : ℝ), (0 : ℝ)) := h.2.2.1
  have h₇ : (Y = (X.1 - (X.2 - W.2), X.2 + (X.1 - W.1)) ∧ Z = (W.1 - (X.2 - W.2), W.2 + (X.1 - W.1)) ∨ Y = (X.1 + (X.2 - W.2), X.2 - (X.1 - W.1)) ∧ Z = (W.1 + (X.2 - W.2), W.2 - (X.1 - W.1))) := h.2.2.2.1
  have h₈ : (0 : ℝ) < Y.1 ∧ Y.1 < (12 : ℝ) ∧ (0 : ℝ) < Y.2 ∧ Y.2 < (12 : ℝ) := h.2.2.2.2.1
  have h₉ : (0 : ℝ) < Z.1 ∧ Z.1 < (12 : ℝ) ∧ (0 : ℝ) < Z.2 ∧ Z.2 < (12 : ℝ) := h.2.2.2.2.2
  have h₁₀ : Y = (9, 5) := by
    cases h₇ with
    | inl h₇ =>
      have h₁₀₁ : Y = (X.1 - (X.2 - W.2), X.2 + (X.1 - W.1)) := h₇.1
      have h₁₀₂ : Z = (W.1 - (X.2 - W.2), W.2 + (X.1 - W.1)) := h₇.2
      have h₁₀₃ : Y.1 = 9 := by
        rw [h₁₀₁]
        simp [h₅, h₆, Prod.ext_iff]
        <;> norm_num
        <;> linarith
      have h₁₀₄ : Y.2 = 5 := by
        rw [h₁₀₁]
        simp [h₅, h₆, Prod.ext_iff]
        <;> norm_num
        <;> linarith
      have h₁₀₅ : Y = (9, 5) := by
        apply Prod.ext
        · rw [h₁₀₃]
          <;> simp [h₁₀₁, h₅, h₆, Prod.ext_iff]
          <;> norm_num
        · rw [h₁₀₄]
          <;> simp [h₁₀₁, h₅, h₆, Prod.ext_iff]
          <;> norm_num
      exact h₁₀₅
    | inr h₇ =>
      have h₁₀₁ : Y = (X.1 + (X.2 - W.2), X.2 - (X.1 - W.1)) := h₇.1
      have h₁₀₂ : Z = (W.1 + (X.2 - W.2), W.2 - (X.1 - W.1)) := h₇.2
      have h₁₀₃ : Y.2 = -5 := by
        rw [h₁₀₁]
        simp [h₅, h₆, Prod.ext_iff]
        <;> norm_num
        <;> linarith
      have h₁₀₄ : (0 : ℝ) < Y.2 := h₈.2.2.1
      linarith
  have h₁₁ : Z = (4, 9) := by
    cases h₇ with
    | inl h₇ =>
      have h₁₁₁ : Y = (X.1 - (X.2 - W.2), X.2 + (X.1 - W.1)) := h₇.1
      have h₁₁₂ : Z = (W.1 - (X.2 - W.2), W.2 + (X.1 - W.1)) := h₇.2
      have h₁₁₃ : Z = (4, 9) := by
        rw [h₁₁₂]
        simp [h₅, h₆, Prod.ext_iff]
        <;> norm_num
        <;> linarith
      exact h₁₁₃
    | inr h₇ =>
      have h₁₁₁ : Y = (X.1 + (X.2 - W.2), X.2 - (X.1 - W.1)) := h₇.1
      have h₁₁₂ : Z = (W.1 + (X.2 - W.2), W.2 - (X.1 - W.1)) := h₇.2
      have h₁₁₃ : Y.2 = -5 := by
        rw [h₁₁₁]
        simp [h₅, h₆, Prod.ext_iff]
        <;> norm_num
        <;> linarith
      have h₁₁₄ : (0 : ℝ) < Y.2 := h₈.2.2.1
      linarith
  have h₁₂ : B.1 = (12 : ℝ) := by simp [h₂]
  have h₁₃ : B.2 = (0 : ℝ) := by simp [h₂]
  have h₁₄ : C.1 = (12 : ℝ) := by simp [h₃]
  have h₁₅ : C.2 = (12 : ℝ) := by simp [h₃]
  have h₁₆ : Y.1 = (9 : ℝ) := by
    rw [h₁₀]
    <;> simp [Prod.ext_iff]
    <;> norm_num
  have h₁₇ : Y.2 = (5 : ℝ) := by
    rw [h₁₀]
    <;> simp [Prod.ext_iff]
    <;> norm_num
  have h₁₈ : Z.1 = (4 : ℝ) := by
    rw [h₁₁]
    <;> simp [Prod.ext_iff]
    <;> norm_num
  have h₁₉ : Z.2 = (9 : ℝ) := by
    rw [h₁₁]
    <;> simp [Prod.ext_iff]
    <;> norm_num
  have h₂₀ : |B.1 * (C.2 - Y.2) + C.1 * (Y.2 - B.2) + Y.1 * (B.2 - C.2)| / (2 : ℝ) = (18 : ℝ) := by
    rw [h₁₂, h₁₃, h₁₄, h₁₅, h₁₆, h₁₇]
    norm_num [abs_of_pos, abs_of_nonneg, le_of_lt]
    <;> ring_nf
    <;> norm_num
    <;> linarith
  simpa [h₂₀] using h₂₀
